name: Sengenjin Wakes from a Millennium
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>千</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>年</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ねん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>眠</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ねむ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>りから<ruby lang="jp"><rb>覚</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>さ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>めし<ruby lang="jp"><rb>原</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>人</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
name_jp_rom: Sennen no Nemuri kara Sameshi Genjin
name_jp_tl: Primitive Man Awakening from a Millennium Sleep
desc: Cannot be destroyed by monster effects. You can only use each of the following effects of "Sengenjin Wakes from a Millennium" once per turn. If this card is in your hand: You can place it in your Spell & Trap Zone as a face-up Continuous Spell. While this card is a Continuous Spell: You can either pay 2000 LP, or reveal 1 "Millennium Ankh" in your hand; Special Summon this card, then you can add 1 "Millennium" monster from your Deck to your hand.
mnst_eff: Cannot be destroyed by monster effects. You can only use each of the following effects of "Sengenjin Wakes from a Millennium" once per turn. If this card is in your hand: You can place it in your Spell & Trap Zone as a face-up Continuous Spell. While this card is a Continuous Spell: You can either pay 2000 LP, or reveal 1 "Millennium Ankh" in your hand; Special Summon this card, then you can add 1 "Millennium" monster from your Deck to your hand.
eff: Cannot be destroyed by monster effects. You can only use each of the following effects of "Sengenjin Wakes from a Millennium" once per turn. If this card is in your hand: You can place it in your Spell & Trap Zone as a face-up Continuous Spell. While this card is a Continuous Spell: You can either pay 2000 LP, or reveal 1 "Millennium Ankh" in your hand; Special Summon this card, then you can add 1 "Millennium" monster from your Deck to your hand.

action: Places itself in Spell & Trap Zone
mst: Cannot be destroyed by card effects
Treats monsters as Continuous Spell Cards
summoning: Special Summons itself from your Spell & Trap Zone
